code:
import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if start >= 0
          let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          start = -1
        end
      else
        if start < 0
          start = i
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = tokenize(line1)

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match find_index(xs, target)
when Some(i)
  print("index=#{i}")
when None
  print("not_found")
end
